title: BiCouple
description: A modpack for Bisexual couples to play along and have fun in their own way, hope you enjoy it!
body:
*• How does your pack cater to or interest bi people and couples specifically?*

This modpack inspires diversity through it's mods and gameplay, such as individuals or couples, there's enough freedom in order to do whatever you please on your own or with someone! And we ensured that the gameplay is inclusive and welcoming to players of all backgrounds and orientations. We avoided content that may be exclusive or offensive and strive

*• What type of mods and content is in this pack?*

There's some optimization mods in order for the modpack to run on every type of PC/Mac Configuration!
And Vanilla like mods to make the Minecraft experience authentic as possible but still inovative enough.

*• What was your inspiration for creating this pack?*

Me and my girlfriend wanted a modpack to play together as a couple but she runs a low end laptop from the early 2017 and i use a M1 Pro Macbook as well as a gaming PC, with those very different configurations we thought of bringing together some optimization mods and a few vanilla feel ones to keep the modpack from being giga heavy.
